description: Quality baseline standards — verification checks, coverage expectations, acceptance/proof discipline, performance checks.

fixed_rules.name: Build Must Pass
fixed_rules.description: TypeScript compilation (tsc --noEmit) must pass with zero errors before any gate can be satisfied.

fixed_rules.name: Lint Must Pass
fixed_rules.description: Linting must pass with zero errors. Warnings are tracked but do not block.

fixed_rules.name: Unit Tests Required
fixed_rules.description: Every core module must have corresponding unit tests. All tests must pass.

fixed_rules.name: Proof-Based Acceptance
fixed_rules.description: Acceptance criteria must be verified with concrete proof artifacts, not self-attestation.

configurable_rules.name: Minimum Test Coverage
configurable_rules.description: Minimum code coverage percentage for core modules.

configurable_rules.name: Integration Test Requirement
configurable_rules.description: Integration tests must cover critical path workflows.

configurable_rules.name: Performance Baseline
configurable_rules.description: Performance checks are required when NFR performance targets are defined.
